other_observers: Many observers more than 40 for the day; Peter Gent may have been the original finder but I do not know for certain.
description: A warbler with a greenish back and yellow lower breast, belly and vent. The head, throat and upper breast was gray with a darker gray lower edge to this hood.Behaviors: foraging in willows and Russian olives usually staying low but occasionally up to 10 feet high.Call: none notedPlumage: adult
